name: polarisagi-computer-use
description: Universal desktop automation. Control apps (e.g., WeChat, browsers), use keyboard/mouse, capture screenshots, and send chat messages natively via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Automate desktop apps, send WeChat/chat messages, control mouse/keyboard.
interface.longDescription: Allows the AI agent to automate desktop applications, send messages via chat apps (like WeChat, Slack, DingTalk), control the computer's mouse and keyboard, and capture screenshots using native OS automation APIs. Built in Python. Cross-platform: macOS, Windows, Linux.
defaultPrompt: Open WeChat and send a message to '小伙伴'.
Take a screenshot of the current screen.
Click on the button at coordinates [100, 200].
